sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Ground Type System
special_mechanics.description: Game tracks different ground types affecting movement physics: flat (plat), flat slippery (glissant plat in minecart stage), wall (mur in snowsled stage), and empty (vide in bonus stages)

special_mechanics.name: Multiple Smurf Characters
special_mechanics.description: Player can select different Smurfs with potentially different movement characteristics. Special character 'Luge' used in snowsled stage

tier_notes: Tier 3: No precise movement physics data available. Source contains only debug menu information and ROM archaeology. No gameplay parameters, gravity values, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel system details documented.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - The Smurfs (SNES) page
